titleStmt.title: SII 28.241: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 241. (A.R. No. 396 of 1913.) Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, north wall.
The record is prefaced by the rather rare eulogy of the king beginning with Tirumādu puviyeṉum. The record available is incomplete.

The peruṅguṛi-pperumakkaḷ of Vānavanmādēvi-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam of Mēṟkkā-nāḍu in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu, assembled in the courtyard (of the temple) of Vaḷavanmādēvi-Viṇṇagar-āḻvār and executed a sabhā-vyavasthai (arrangement of sabhā) in respect of land assigned for the provision of food-offerings and viniyōgam in the name of Chandraśēkharapperumāḷ-Deśi-nāyakar in the temple of Vijayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-Īśvaram-uḍaiya[nāyanār]. Other details have been lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumātu puviyeṉum perumātarivar taṉmāteviyarkaḷāka mitoḷi veṇkuṭai yuyarttu tiṇkali piyarttu taṉ ciṟiya tātaiyākiya Eṟivali keṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉai poṅki kali muṭi coḻaneṉṟum porumuraṭṭi
ru ttampiyar tammuḷ veṉṟi koḷa mummuṭicoḻa tammuṉaiya tiṟan coḻapā l vīracoḻaṉaippaṭi pukaṭk karikāla coḻaneṉṟum porutoḻil ttaṭakkai maturāntakaṉaic coḻakaṅkanenṟu toḷ
valimevi kal parāntakatevaṉaic coḻavayottiya rājaneṉṟun tiyāka koḷ taṉṟiruvuḷattaṉpoṭu karutā kātal ṉṟāṭu talam pukaḻ rājentracoḻaṉai Uttamacoḻaneṉṟum tottaṇimucaiya vitalaṅkal muṭikoṇṭa coḻaṉai Ikal vicaiyālayaneṉṟum pukarmukat
teḻutiyā kaḷiṟṟuc coḻakeraḷaṉai vārcilaic coḻa keraḷaneṉṟun tiṇṭiṟaṟ kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻaṉait tiṉakarar kulattuc ciṟappamar coḻajaṉagarājaneṉnuṅkaṉai kaḻaṟppaṭi koṇṭa pala pukaḻ muṭikoṇṭa coḻaṉaic cuntara coḻaneṉṟuñ centamiṭappiṭikaliraṭ
ṭapāṭi koṇṭa coḻaṉaittolpuviyāḷuṭaic coḻakaṉṉakucciyarājaneṉṟum maṉṉutaṉ kātalar kātalar tammuḷ metaku tirāṅkaṉai kaḻal maturāntakaṉai velpaṭaic coḻavallapaneṉṟum māṉaccilaikkaiyorāṉaic cevakaṉai nirupentracoḻaneṉṟum parumaṇic
cuṭar neṭumakuṭañ cūṭṭi paṭimicai nikaḻum nāḷiṉuḷ Ikalveṭṭeḻuntu ceṉṟoṇṭiṟaliraṭṭamaṇṭalamey tina nekamaḻintaṉaṉ vaḷavaneṉṟam moḻikeṭṭu vekaveñcaḷukki trikavamallaṉ paripavamiṉakki teṉṟeri viḻitteḻuntu � ṅkirtti koppattaka
vaiyil Uṭaṉ tireṉṟamar tuṭaṅkip poḻutavaṉ ceñcamaramāri taṉkuñcara mukattiṉuntan tiruttuṭaiyiṉuṅ ku kkavun taṉṉuṭa nakkaḷiṟeṟiya toṭukaḻal virar maṭiyavum vakaiyātoru taniyanekamum porupaṭai vaḻaṅki moyampa caḷukki tampi jayaciṅkaṉu
m poṟppulaka � ntarācatapanmaṉummāṉa maṉnavaril maṇṭaliya co ṉum Āṉavaṉ pukaḻāḷumaraiyaṉun teṉa yaṉun tiṭṭi naṉṉi nuḷampaṉumeṉumivar mutaliyar Eṇṇiliyaraicarai viṇṇakatteṟṟi vaṉṉiyarevaṉum vayappa ṭattut taṉuṅko
ṉṉavil paṭaiku ṉumeṉṟiṉṉa veñciṉavaraicaroṭañciya caḷukki kula kulakulaiyntu talai mayir virittu muṉṉuṟa neḷi la paṟintoṭa mel kaṭal pācciya poḻtil cerukkaḷattavaṉ viṭu catturu payaṅkaraṉ kāpattira mutal pattira cāti pakaṭṭaraicane mu ma ṭa parikaḷum Oṭṭaka
niraikaḷum varākavel koṭi mutal rāja pariccantamum Oppi caṭṭi vasahappaiyeṉṟiyar mutal teviyar kuḻāmum pāvaiyariṭṭa vaiyiṟ koṇṭu vijaiya Abhiṣegañceytu teṉṟicai yelvaiyil poṟppaṭai naṭātti viṟaṟppaṭaik kaliṅkar maṉavi tirame kaṭar kaḷiṟṟo
ṭum paṭakkatir muṭita t Ilaṅkaik kiṟaivaṉ māppāṉaṉ kātalariruvaraik kaḷattiṭaip piṭittu māpperum puka saripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu 4āvatu ṉāl rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkkā nāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīvānavanmātevic caruppetimaṅka
lattup peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Iṟṟai nāḷāl pakal naṭuvil tirumuṟṟam vaḷavanmātevi viṇṇakar Āḻvār tirumuṟṟa� peruṅkuṟikūṭi tu paṇittu sabhā vyavasthai paricāvatu Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai ṉa vijayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa Īśvaramuṭai yilil cantracekarap peru

māḷ tecināyakar tirunāmattāl tiruvamutukkum Ittevar viniyogattukkum ko nilam cikaravatikku kiḻakku van mātevi vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu teṉmelai muṉṟu māvum cantracekaravatikku kiḻakku tiripuvanamātevi vāykkālukku vaṭakku mu
taṟk kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu nilam Araiye Oru mā mukkāṇiyum nālāñ catirattu teṟkkil Āṟumā nilam Oṉ� mukkāṇi Iṉnilam Oṉṟey mukkāṇiyum Eṭṭāntarattin kiḻ maṭakki vanta nilam AraimāvaraikkāIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 28.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
